{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Wei clan gates
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Wei clan gates]] are carved with purple flowers and white foxes.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
